name: plcopen-softmotion
description: CODESYS SoftMotion (SM3) compatible PLCopen Motion Control for CiA 402 servo drives. AXIS_REF_SM3 + MC_* blocks in LREAL technical units, over the OpenSML light SoftMotion engine (GPL-3.0, https://github.com/feecat/OpenSML) and S7RTT OTG (Apache-2.0, https://github.com/feecat/S7RTT).

SM_DRIVE_GENERICDS402.documentation: Generic CiA 402 (DS402) drive bridge — the OpenPLC analogue of CODESYS SM_Drive_ETC_GenericDSP402. One per axis, called each scan; bridges the CiA 402 PDO image to AXIS_REF_SM3, converting increments <-> technical units and deriving the PLCopen axis state.

MC_POWER.documentation: Enables/disables the power stage of a CiA 402 axis and runs the drive enable sequence. Status is TRUE once operation is enabled.

MC_READAXISERROR.documentation: Reads the axis error state and error identifier (AxisError / AxisErrorID) from the CiA 402 drive.

MC_HOME.documentation: Commands the drive's homing procedure (CiA 402 mode 6). Requires homing method/speeds configured on the drive (0x6098/0x6099/0x609A).

MC_MOVEABSOLUTE.documentation: Moves to an absolute target position using the drive's Profile Position mode (CiA 402 mode 1). Position/Velocity are in raw drive increments.

MC_MOVERELATIVE.documentation: Moves a relative distance using the drive's Profile Position mode (CiA 402 mode 1). Distance/Velocity are in raw drive increments.

MC_MOVEVELOCITY.documentation: Commands a continuous velocity using the drive's Profile Velocity mode (CiA 402 mode 3). Velocity is signed, in raw drive increments/s.

MC_STOP.documentation: Requests a controlled stop (halt) and holds the axis at standstill.

MC_HALT.documentation: Requests a controlled halt; the axis can resume with a new motion command.

MC_RESET.documentation: Acknowledges/clears a drive fault (CiA 402 fault reset, ControlWord bit 7).

MC_READACTUALPOSITION.documentation: Reads the axis actual position (0x6064) in raw drive increments.

MC_READACTUALVELOCITY.documentation: Reads the axis actual velocity (0x606C) in raw drive increments/s.

MC_READSTATUS.documentation: Reads the CiA 402 axis state (fault / operation-enabled / standstill) from the StatusWord.

OPENSML_POWER.documentation: OpenSML CiA 402 power/enable sequence state machine (backs MC_Power).

OPENSML_HOME.documentation: OpenSML homing state machine, CiA 402 mode 6 (backs MC_Home).

OPENSML_PROFILEPOSITION.documentation: OpenSML Profile Position state machine, CiA 402 mode 1 (backs MC_MoveAbsolute/MC_MoveRelative).

OPENSML_PROFILEVELOCITY.documentation: OpenSML Profile Velocity state machine, CiA 402 mode 3 (backs MC_MoveVelocity).

OPENSML_STOP.documentation: OpenSML software stop; sets the halt bit (ControlWord bit 8).

OPENSML_SYNCPOSITION.documentation: OpenSML Cyclic Synchronous Position (CiA 402 mode 8): streams jerk-limited setpoints from the S7RTT OTG each cycle.

OPENSML_SYNCVELOCITY.documentation: OpenSML Cyclic Synchronous Velocity via the S7RTT OTG (streams position setpoints in mode 8).

OPENSML_AXISCONTROLLER.documentation: OpenSML high-level axis controller: jog/follow motion over an OpenSML_Control aggregate, using S7RTT interpolation.

FB_S7RTT_OTG.documentation: Single-axis 7-segment S-curve online trajectory generator (jerk-limited). Feeds position setpoints for cyclic-synchronous modes.

FB_S7RTT_PLAN.documentation: S7RTT trajectory planner: builds the jerk-limited motion profile consumed by FB_S7RTT_OTG.
